title: Edited segments.ts

evidence.prompt:
The usage reset timer icon isn't rendered properly so the time after it is kind of overlayed over it.
The cost estimator should have a dollar symbol next to it

body:
Prompt: The usage reset timer icon isn't rendered properly so the time after it is kind of overlayed over it.
The cost estimator should have a dollar symbol next to it

Result: Fixed both:

- Replaced the problematic reset glyph (`↺`) with plain text:
  - `5h reset 1h23m`
  - `7d reset 2d4h`
- Added the configured cost/dollar icon next to the session cost:
  - Nerd font: dollar icon + amount
  - ASCII fallback: `$ 0.123`

`npm run typecheck` passes. Restart `little-coder` to see it.
